content.title: U.S. hits Canada with stiff new tariffs, escalating trade tensions
content.summary: The Trump administration on Monday said it would slap 50% tariffs on some goods imported from Canada, in an effort to end what it sees as discriminatory trade practices by Ottawa against the U.S. automobile, dairy and alcohol industries.

content.title: I racked up $35,000 in credit-card debt. Should I file for bankruptcy?
content.summary: “I’m also considering working with a credit-counseling agency or enrolling in a hardship program.”

content.title: Why are gasoline prices rising faster than oil prices? Blame it on the ‘crack.’
content.summary: The spread between the cost of barrels of gasoline and crude oil — known as the “crack spread” — has widened sharply.

content.title: I will claim Social Security early. Why do so few people talk about the elephant in the room?
content.summary: “The strongest argument for claiming benefits earlier goes beyond the traditional break-even analyses.”

content.title: Why cheap Chinese AI models could actually be a boon for Nvidia, Micron and other chip stocks
content.summary: Moonshot AI’s Kimi K3 could encourage a surge in enterprise workloads and provide a long-term tailwind to chip demand.

content.title: We have $8 million in traditional IRAs. Should we tap them to buy a house — and take the tax hit?
content.summary: “We would rather pay taxes upfront than pay mortgage interest.”

content.title: Americans are skipping lettuce and salads as investigation into cyclospora outbreak continues
content.summary: Shares of salad chains like Cava, Chipotle and Sweetgreen closed lower on Monday.

content.title: Global oil prices settle at one-month high despite new Iran ceasefire proposal, as blockade on Saudi Arabia by Yemen’s Houthis keeps market on edge
content.summary: Oil prices settled at one-month highs in volatile trading on Monday as traders weighed escalating geopolitical tensions following a fresh barrage of strikes across the Middle East over the weekend against reports of a new ceasefire proposal between the U.S. and Iran.

content.title: Lumentum’s stock just got a lot more interesting — and Barclays has turned bullish
content.summary: A Barclays analyst now recommends Lumentum’s stock after a period of substantial underperformance relative to the broader chip sector.

content.title: Wall Street’s AI divide: Inside the bull and bear cases for what comes next for the stock market
content.summary: Three years into the AI trade, Wall Street is no closer to agreeing about whether it’s a bubble, how much longer it can keep going or what might ultimately end it.
